title: EV4 Builder Session State
description: Session state for EV4 Builder Assistant. Patch 1 adds workflow_mode/runtime_state separation while preserving legacy current_state compatibility. max_actions_per_turn is intentionally bounded to 1..5 by STEP_SIZE_CONTRACT.

workflow_mode.description: Preferred Patch 1 workflow enum. It answers which workflow is active.

runtime_state.description: Preferred Patch 1 runtime enum. It answers what is happening now inside the workflow.

state_capsule.description: Optional one-line public state capsule for builder-session replies where state matters. It is not a checkpoint replacement.

current_state.description: Legacy field retained for backward compatibility. Prefer runtime_state for new data. CORRECTION_MODE maps to CORRECTION; REVIEW_MODE maps to REVIEW_ONLY.

max_actions_per_turn.description: User-adjustable maximum action count. Valid values are 1..5 only. Values above 5 are intentionally rejected.
